title: 404 error when accessing additional non-UI route
symptom: When trying to access the static file at the specified URL, n8n returns a 404 error: 'Cannot GET /xxxx_verify.txt'. This indicates that the file is not being served correctly.
not_this_if: File is correctly served from a different path
root_cause: The 404 error occurs because the additional non-UI routes are not properly configured in the n8n server. The environment variable alone does not suffice; the server's routing logic must also be modified to recognize the new routes.
fix_steps: Set the environment variables N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL and WEBHOOK_URL to your desired subdomain.
Map a modified server.js file to the container path /usr/local/lib/node_modules/n8n/dist/server.js.
Add the line for your specific file name in the nonUIRoutes array in server.js.
Restart the n8n container to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Modify the server.js file to include your static file in the nonUIRoutes and restart the container.
